subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of One mighty and wise, and it teacheth you knowledge and wisdom, and sustaineth you with heavenly sustenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیما و یعلمکم العلم و الحکمه و یرزقکم مائده
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations
